title: Golden Globes 2026 Nominations: Snubs & Predictions
text: The Golden Globes ceremony takes place January 11, 2026, at the Beverly Hilton, airing on CBS and Paramount+. The event introduces new categories including stand-up comedy and podcast of the year. Paul Thomas Anderson's political satire One Battle After Another leads with nine nominations. Other strong contenders include the Norwegian drama Sentimental Value and Ryan Coogler's thriller Sinners. The White Lotus tops the TV field with six nominations, while limited series Adolescence makes a strong showing in its category. The biggest snub centers on Wicked: For Good, which missed the Musical or Comedy film nomination despite being one of the biggest musical releases of the year. Best Drama Film predictions favor Sentimental Value as the favorite, while One Battle After Another is expected to win Best Comedy Film. The White Lotus is positioned as the show to beat in Best TV Drama, while The Bear is seen as the fresher contender with momentum for Best TV Comedy. The article notes that this year's Globes feel more globally minded and genre-diverse than ever.
